channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lawmakers seek answers after report of ICE officer shooting in Maine
item.description: Democratic lawmakers are pressing Homeland Security for details on its vetting and training of immigration enforcement officers.

item.title: President Trump delivers national address on election claims
item.description: Ahead of the midterm elections, President Trump gave a primetime speech on election security, following years of unsubstantiated claims about the 2020 election.

item.title: Shipping faces worst-case scenario as US and Iran intensify attacks
item.description: With the US and Iran escalating hostilities 140 days into the conflict, an industry analyst says no one is willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump speaks on elections, alleges Chinese access to voter data
item.description: President Trump delivered a primetime address on elections tonight, continuing to focus on the 2020 race.
